classification.rationale: Currency reference table loaded via TRUNCATE + INSERT inside sp_executesql; descriptive columns (CurrencyAlternateKey, CurrencyName) with no SCD history columns confirm dim_non_scd. Status is partial because the INSERT is inside a dynamic SQL string, not statically parsed by the scoping engine.

primary_key.rationale: CurrencyKey is declared as the primary key via catalog constraint PK__DimCurre__DC9C5DF033ED6A78 and is an identity-generated surrogate.

natural_key.rationale: CurrencyKey is an identity surrogate (catalog fact); CurrencyAlternateKey (NCHAR(3)) holds the ISO 4217 currency code and is the natural business identifier.

watermark.rationale: Full-reload pattern (TRUNCATE + INSERT) with no datetime columns and no incremental WHERE clause; no watermark applies.
